Our Promise

No shortcuts.
No preservatives.
Just bread.

Every loaf at Bake My Day begins with the ripest bananas we can source. We bake in small batches — never mass-produced, never frozen. What you receive is exactly what left our kitchen that morning.

Bespoke Orders

Whether it's a corporate hamper for fifty, a wedding favour, or a birthday surprise — we craft every custom order with the same care as our daily bakes.

Our Story

Born in a kitchen.
Built on flavour.

BakeMyDay.gh began as a personal obsession with making the perfect banana bread. What started with overripe bananas and a family recipe has grown into Accra's most sought-after artisan banana bread brand.

500+
Happy Customers
From individuals to corporations, our loaves bring joy across Accra and beyond.
12+
Distinct Flavours
From Classic to Oreo Crumble — a flavour for every palate and every occasion.
Same Day
Delivery in Accra
Order before noon and receive your freshly baked bread by evening.
Our Values

What we stand for.

We refuse to compromise. Every ingredient is chosen with intention. Every loaf is mixed by hand. Every order is packed with care. We do not use preservatives, artificial flavours, or shortcuts. If it leaves our kitchen, it meets our standard.
